source_of_truth: QIF v0.3.0 release tag and local external-ref artifact are the source boundary
permission_boundary: read-only reference; no external writes authorized
approval_boundary: release-linked quality provider dependency; external updates require Council approval
side_effect_boundary: read-only; no provider execution, billing, secrets, deploy, or production write
not_proven: This resource record does not prove QIF semantic suitability for every AOF work product or any market/operator acceptance.
